headline: OWL Q1 Earnings Meet on Revenue & AUM Growth, Stock Gains 9.8%
summary: Blue Owl shares jump 9.8% after Q1 earnings meet estimates, as rising revenues, strong fundraising and higher AUM offset pressure from increased expenses.

headline: Federated Hermes Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, AUM Reaches Record Level
summary: FHI tops Q1 earnings estimates as AUM hits a record level, driven by strong fee growth, though rising expenses continue to weigh on overall profitability.

headline: JPMorgan Is Betting On Tokenization, But ETF Exec Says 'Good Use Cases' Are Years Away
summary: Tokenization holds a lot of promise but its realization is likely still some ways away, according to JPMorgan Chase's. (NYSE:JPM) global ETF product chief. Tokenization will reshape financial markets, "but we're a couple of years away from some good use...

headline: Why BlackRock’s Rick Rieder Thinks the U.S. Economy Is Basically Recession-Proof
summary: Rick Rieder, CIO of global fixed income at BlackRock, called presumptive Fed chair Kevin Warsh “a brilliant guy” on Barron’s Live. He’s bullish on the economy and stock market, too.

headline: Not So Fast, Texas. This City Manages Far More Money—and It’s Not New York.
summary: There is no satellite money-management center more significant than Boston—and that includes Texas and Florida. One of its secrets: adapting to change.
